svg.title: ADAM // COMMAND CENTER — VECTOR HORIZON
svg.desc: A retro-futuristic green-phosphor CRT dashboard. A glowing wireframe vector sun rises over a rushing perspective grid horizon while a rotating dot globe floats above with travel blips. Cyan and magenta status bars pulse, a radar sweeps, and a crew of pixel figures marches across the bottom ticker.

g.text: ALL SYSTEMS NOMINAL · 7 AGENTS · GRID LOCKED · SUN +12° · BKK TRACK HOT ·
